SMILE INDEX: 71
WINDOW: 1006.167s to 1041.800s (smile at 1026.167s to 1026.800s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: And for this reason, not one Polish airplane could go up and fight the Germans, all gone. Right in the morning, when I  saw the Germans ordered in, I went to the station and took the last train to Krakow. This was south of Katowice from Silesia. I joined my army. And we retreated, my formation, the battalion.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
This was

context_segments.speaker: interviewee
context_segments.text: And for this reason, not one Polish airplane could go up and fight the Germans, all gone. Right in the morning, when I  saw the Germans ordered in, I went to the station and took the last train to Krakow. This was south of Katowice from Silesia. I joined my army. And we retreated, my formation, the battalion.
